name: Suspicious Activity on Confidential Data Detected by DLP Devices
notes:
This rule triggers when suspicious activity on confidential data is detected from a DLP Device. The DLP devices are defined in the BB:DeviceDefinition: DLP Devices building block.

Note: The DLP Policies reference set must be populated.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: DLP Devices
when any of Policy Name (custom) are contained in any of DLP Policies - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Activity on Confidential Data Detected by DLP Devices on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: DLP Devices
AND when any of Policy Name (custom) are contained in any of DLP Policies - AlphaNumeric
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Activity on Confidential Data Detected by DLP Devices
Event description: Detected a suspicious activity on a confidential data by a DLP device
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
